description: Style Note This lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun fridays at work. You can also use this shoe for an early morning jog in the park. Product Details Round toed white shoe with central lace-ups and perforations all over the forefoot region Padded tongue and inner Tough rubber midsole TPU outsole with patterned grooves Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
